Bindings.Binding: if CustomLustOptionsFrame and CustomLustOptionsFrame:IsShown() then -- do nothing, user can click Preview end if CustomLustEffectFrame then -- call preview directly if core loaded if CustomLustDB and CustomLustDB.enabled and CustomLustEffectFrame then -- call addon preview (exposed via namespace) if _G.CustomLustEffectFrame and _G.CustomLustEffectFrame:IsShown() then -- ignore end end end if (select(2, ...)) then end
